metadata.name: Find a New Supplier for a Product

description: A current supplier is being discontinued. A procurement manager needs to find a new, alternative supplier for a key product.

nodes.task_description: Search a supplier database for companies that manufacture the required product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds three potential new suppliers.

nodes.task_description: Request quotes and product samples from the potential suppliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the suppliers to gather more information.

nodes.task_description: Evaluate the quotes and samples to select the best new supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects a new supplier based on price and quality.

nodes.task_description: Onboard the chosen company as a new supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the new supplier in the system.
